parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: '#n8n-alerts', text: ':x: CONTRACT TEST FAILED — ' + $json.failCount + '/' + $json.totalTests + ' tests failed', blocks: [{ type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: ':x: Platform Contract Test FAILED', emoji: true }}, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*' + $json.failCount + ' of ' + $json.totalTests + ' tests failed*\\n' + $json.tests.filter(t => !t.pass).map(t => ':red_circle: ' + t.test + ': ' + t.details).join('\\n') }}] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// On success, just return summary — no Slack spam for passing tests
return [{ json: { result: 'ALL_PASS', tests: $json.totalTests, timestamp: $json.timestamp } }];
